title: dollinera rufescens
intro: Dollinera rufescens is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is commonly known as the Red Dollinera or Dollinera. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Dollinera rufescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
